name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: UAC Bypass - DLL Hijacking (System Directory)
notes: This Building Block triggers when a high integrity process loads an unsigned DLL from the system directory.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: UAC Bypass - DLL Hijacking (System Directory) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
BB:BehaviorDefinition: Unsigned DLL Loaded from System Directory
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Unsigned DLL Loaded from System Directory, BB:CategoryDefinition: High/System Integrity Process Creation
when at least 2 events are seen with the same Process ID (custom), Machine Identifier (custom) and different Low Level Category in 2 minutes
thresholds: when at least 2 events are seen with the same Process ID (custom), Machine Identifier (custom) and different Low Level Category in 2 minutes
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: UAC Bypass - DLL Hijacking (System Directory) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Unsigned DLL Loaded from System Directory, BB:CategoryDefinition: High/System Integrity Process Creation
AND when at least 2 events are seen with the same Process ID (custom), Machine Identifier (custom) and different Low Level Category in 2 minutes
